stemHtml: As an aeroplane accelerates beyond its critical Mach number (MCRIT), it will experience a pitching...

options.a: up moment, due to movement of the CP, which will further increase the speed.
options.b: down moment, due to movement of the CP, which will dangerously reduce the speed.
options.c: up moment, due to the formation of shockwaves, which will dangerously reduce the speed.
options.d: down moment, due to the formation of shockwaves, which will further increase the speed.
